testimonials.headline: What Players Say
testimonials.t1: Won 15,000 credits on my first day! The Classic Slots are addictive.
testimonials.t2: Love how easy it is to get started. The free credits were a nice surprise.
testimonials.t3: Megaways is insane — 117,649 ways to win. Best slot game I've played.
testimonials.t4: The mobile experience is perfect. I play on my commute every day.
testimonials.t5: Cascade Reels with chain multipliers is genius. Hit an 8x multiplier yesterday!
testimonials.t6: Simple, beautiful, and fair. The provably fair system gives me confidence.

freeToPlay.a: Yes! Every new player receives 500 free credits on signup with no deposit required. You also earn 50 free credits daily just by logging in.

welcomeBonus.q: How do I claim my welcome bonus?
welcomeBonus.a: Simply create an account and your 500 free credits will be added automatically. No promo code needed.

fairGames.a: Absolutely. We use a provably fair system based on HMAC-SHA256 cryptographic seeds. Every spin result can be independently verified. You can check any past spin using the server seed, client seed, and nonce.

jackpotWorks.a: A small percentage (0.5%) of every bet contributes to the progressive jackpot pool. The jackpot can be won on any spin — the current amount is displayed in real time.

mobilePlay.a: Yes! Midnight Riches is fully responsive and works on all modern mobile browsers. No app download required.

paymentMethods.a: We accept all major credit and debit cards through our secure Stripe payment integration. All transactions are encrypted and PCI-DSS compliant.

withdrawWinnings.q: How do I withdraw my winnings?
withdrawWinnings.a: Navigate to your Wallet page and select Withdraw. Withdrawals are processed within 24 hours to your original payment method.

dataSecure.a: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption for all data transmission. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt, and all payments are handled by Stripe with no card details stored on our servers.

finalCta.headline: Your Next Big Win is One Spin Away

exitIntent.headline: Wait! Your 500 Free Credits Are About to Expire
exitIntent.description: Claim your welcome bonus before it's gone. No deposit, no card required.
exitIntent.dismiss: No thanks, I'll pass on free credits

welcome.title: Welcome to Midnight Riches!
welcome.description: I'm your casino guide bot. Let me walk you through everything you need to know to start spinning and winning.
welcome.botMessage: Hey there, high roller! Ready to learn the ropes? I'll show you everything in just a few steps. 🎰

reels.title: The Slot Machine
reels.description: The game has 3 reels with 3 rows each. Match symbols across paylines to win. The middle row is always active!
reels.botMessage: See those spinning columns? Those are your reels! The highlighted center row is the main payline — match 3 symbols there and you win!
reels.tip: The center row is highlighted in gold — that's your main winning line!

bet.title: Setting Your Bet
bet.description: Choose your bet per line before each spin. Bet ranges from 0.10 to 100 tokens per line. Higher bets mean higher potential winnings!
bet.botMessage: Pick your bet carefully! Start small to get a feel for the game, then go big when you're feeling lucky. Remember: higher bet = higher reward!
bet.tip: New players: start at 0.50 or 1.00 to make your balance last longer.

spin.title: Spinning & Winning
spin.description: Hit SPIN to set the reels in motion! All outcomes are generated server-side using a cryptographically secure RNG — completely fair and provably random.
spin.botMessage: The moment of truth! Hit that big SPIN button. Everything is fair — I promise. The server generates your result using crypto-secure randomness before you even see the reels stop!
spin.highlight: Server-side RNG — provably fair every spin
spin.tip: Watch for the WIN burst on the reels — each winning payline lights up!

paylines.title: Paylines & Symbols
paylines.description: Match 3 identical symbols across any of the 5 paylines to win. Wild symbols substitute for anything. 3 Scatter symbols trigger 10 free spins with a 2× multiplier!
paylines.botMessage: Here's the secret sauce! Different symbols pay differently. Wilds are your best friend — they complete broken combos. And if you hit 3 Scatters, get ready for FREE SPINS! 🎉
paylines.highlight: Wild = any symbol · Scatter = 10 free spins (2×)
paylines.tip: Watermelon, Wild, and Seven are the highest-paying symbols!

chat.title: Live Chat
chat.description: Join hundreds of live players in the chat! Share your wins, tips, and trash talk. The community makes every session more exciting.
chat.botMessage: Don't play alone! The chat on the left is live — real players are there right now. Share your big wins, ask for tips, or just vibe with the community. That's what makes this place special! 💬
chat.highlight: Real players, real chat, real vibes
chat.tip: The chat shows recent big wins from other players — great motivation!

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Compete against other players for the top spots! The leaderboard tracks biggest wins, most spins, and highest total earnings. Can you make it to #1?
leaderboard.botMessage: The leaderboard is the wall of fame! Can you top it? Every big win pushes you up the rankings. The top players get bragging rights and special recognition. Game on! 🏆
leaderboard.highlight: Compete for the top position daily
leaderboard.tip: Big single wins matter more than total volume for the leaderboard!

shop.title: Collectibles Shop
shop.description: Customize your experience with avatar frames, reel themes, symbol skins, and sound packs! Earn tokens through play, then spend them on exclusive collectibles.
shop.botMessage: Want to stand out? Head to the Collectibles Shop! Buy avatar frames, custom reel themes, pixel symbol skins, and premium music tracks. Some items cost tokens, some cost real money — all look incredible!
shop.highlight: Avatar frames · Reel themes · Sound packs
shop.tip: The Casino Classic music is free! Premium tracks require a purchase from the shop.

bonus.title: Daily Challenges & Bonuses
bonus.description: Check your daily challenges panel for extra token rewards! First-time deposits get a bonus. Responsible gaming limits are built in for your peace of mind.
bonus.botMessage: One last thing — don't forget the Daily Challenges on the right sidebar! These give you extra tokens for completing in-game goals. And your first deposit gets a welcome bonus. Now go spin some wins — you've got this! 🚀
bonus.highlight: Daily rewards + welcome bonus on first deposit
bonus.tip: Complete all 3 daily challenges for a bonus token reward!

gamble.title: Double or Nothing
gamble.chooseCard: Pick a card — red or black
gamble.lostDesc: The original win has been taken back.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Track your progress and unlock rewards as you play.

provablyFair.title: Provably Fair
provablyFair.subtitle: Every spin is cryptographically verifiable. No trust required — just math.
provablyFair.certifiedDesc: Every spin outcome is determined by a server seed, your client seed, and a nonce — combined and hashed before you spin.
provablyFair.step1Desc: Before each spin, our server generates a secret server seed and publishes its SHA-256 hash. You see the hash — not the seed — so the result cannot be changed after the fact.
provablyFair.step2Desc: You can set your own client seed at any time from your settings. This seed is combined with the server seed to produce the final result, ensuring even we cannot predict outcomes.
provablyFair.step3Desc: After each spin, the server seed is revealed. Paste it into the tool below with your client seed and nonce to recompute the SHA-256 hash and confirm it matches what was committed.
provablyFair.verifyToolDesc: Enter a server seed, client seed, and nonce to compute the SHA-256 hash and verify any spin.
provablyFair.hashResultNote: Compare this hash against the committed hash shown before the spin to verify the outcome.
provablyFair.faq1A: A server seed is a randomly generated string created by our server before each spin. Its SHA-256 hash is shown to you before the spin, so you can verify it was not changed afterwards.
provablyFair.faq2A: A client seed is a string you provide (or we generate for you) that is mixed with the server seed. This ensures that even we cannot control your spin outcome, since we don't know what client seed you'll use.
provablyFair.faq3A: The nonce is a counter that increments with each spin. It prevents the same server+client seed pair from producing the same result twice.
provablyFair.faq4Q: How do I verify a past spin?
provablyFair.faq4A: After a spin, retrieve the revealed server seed from your game history. Enter it along with your client seed and the spin nonce into the tool above. The computed hash should match the hash that was shown before the spin.
provablyFair.bottomCtaDesc: All outcomes are verified on every spin. Play with confidence.
